g.title: ensemble_evolution_timeline
g.text: Ensemble-Grafana Evolution: First Prompt to Latest Evidence

g.title: end_to_end
g.text: Storefront journeys: browse, cart, checkout, account, region, language
Spring Boot services: inventory, cart, account
AWS and Kubernetes: edge, auth, data, EKS, rollout controls
Grafana Cloud: Faro, Alloy, Beyla, dashboards, IRM, reports
Verification: Playwright, k6 protocol, k6 browser actions, GCX queries
Communication: Markdown runbooks plus Graphviz DOT, SVG, PNG
